createEditFiles.description: Tell Ryo to spin up HTML applets, edit your TextEdit documents, or browse the Applet Store.

controlApps.description: Ryo can launch apps, switch themes, move stickies, tune the TV, and play iPod songs.

joinChatRooms.title: Join Public Rooms
joinChatRooms.description: Hop into rooms to chat with everyone online — mention @ryo to get AI replies.

pushToTalk.title: Push-to-Talk Voice
pushToTalk.description: Hold Space or tap the mic to record and send voice messages with transcription.

nudgeDjMode.title: Nudge & DJ Mode
nudgeDjMode.description: Send a 👋 nudge for context-aware tips; Ryo turns into a DJ when iPod is playing.

drawingTools.title: Drawing Tools

patterns.description: Pick a classic Mac pattern from the bottom palette to fill any shape or area

mobileControls.description: Tap to reveal, long-press to flag — works great on phones and tablets

backupRestore.title: Backup & Reset
backupRestore.description: Export everything, restore from a backup, or format the virtual disk

setPasswordDialog.title: Set Password
setPasswordDialog.description: Set a password to enable account recovery. You can use this password to get a new token if you lose access.

control-panels.iosVolumeHint: On iOS, use hardware buttons to control media volume

alerts.selectImageFile: Please select an image file. Videos are not supported.
alerts.errorUploadingWallpaper: Error uploading wallpaper. Please try again with a smaller file.
alerts.failedToBackupFileSystem: Failed to backup file system data. Only settings will be backed up.
alerts.failedToRestoreFileSystem: Failed to restore file system data. Only settings will be restored.

empty.title: No sticky notes yet
empty.description: Create a note to get started

createNote.title: Create a Note
createNote.description: File ▸ New Note (or ⌘N) drops a fresh sticky right onto your desktop

colors.title: Color Tags
colors.description: Pick from yellow, pink, blue, green, purple, and more from the Note menu

moveResize.title: Move & Resize
moveResize.description: Drag the title bar to reposition; drag the corner to resize freely

ryoCanEdit.title: Ryo Can Edit
ryoCanEdit.description: Ask Ryo in Chats to add, move, recolor, or rewrite stickies for you

clearAll.title: Clear All
clearAll.description: File ▸ Clear All Notes wipes the bulletin board in one tidy sweep

autoSave.title: Auto-Save
autoSave.description: Notes save automatically and reappear in the same spot on next launch

infinite-mac.name: Infinite Mac
infinite-mac.title: Infinite Mac
infinite-mac.screenshotUnavailable: Screenshot not available. Use your browser's screenshot tool (Cmd+Shift+4 on Mac, Win+Shift+S on Windows).

classicMacEmulator.title: Classic Mac in Your Browser
classicMacEmulator.description: Boot real System 6, 7, 8, or 9 in-browser, powered by Infinite Mac

selectSystem.title: Pick a System
selectSystem.description: Choose any classic Mac OS preset from the grid to launch the emulator

displayScaling.title: Display Scaling
displayScaling.description: View ▸ Scaling switches between 1x, 1.5x, or 2x to fit any screen

pauseResume.title: Pause to Save Power
pauseResume.description: View ▸ Pause halts the VM so it stops eating CPU when you're idle

captureScreenshot.title: Capture Screenshot
captureScreenshot.description: View ▸ Capture Screenshot grabs the current display straight to a file

chatsCanDriveIt.title: Chats Can Drive It
chatsCanDriveIt.description: Ask Ryo in Chats to pause, resume, scale, or screenshot the emulator

playMusic.title: Play Music
playMusic.description: Drag audio files anywhere onto Winamp or add them through the playlist editor

equalizer.title: 10-Band Equalizer
equalizer.description: Open the EQ window to sculpt frequencies and pick from classic genre presets

playlist.title: Playlist Editor
playlist.description: Manage your queue, reorder tracks, and save .m3u playlists for later

skins.title: Custom Skins
skins.description: Right-click for the skin picker — Webamp ships with the original Winamp Classic looks

shuffleRepeat.title: Shuffle & Repeat
shuffleRepeat.description: Toggle shuffle and repeat on the main window for endless or randomized playback

controls.title: Classic Transport
controls.description: Authentic play, pause, stop, next, and previous buttons exactly like Winamp 2

navigateMonths.title: Navigate Months
navigateMonths.description: Use the arrow buttons to flip months, or hit Today to snap back to now

createEvents.title: Create Events
createEvents.description: Double-click any date — or use File ▸ New Event — to add a timed event

todosSidebar.title: Todos Sidebar
todosSidebar.description: Toggle the Todos panel to manage tasks alongside your scheduled events

icalImportExport.title: iCal Import / Export
icalImportExport.description: Drop in .ics files to bulk import, or export your calendar to share with others

ryoSchedules.title: Ryo Schedules It
ryoSchedules.description: Ask Ryo in Chats to add, edit, or summarize your upcoming events for you

undoAutoSave.title: Undo & Auto-Save
undoAutoSave.description: Every change auto-saves; ⌘Z reverts deletes, edits, and even bulk imports

contacts.name: Contacts
contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.emptyState: No contacts yet. Create one or import a vCard to get started.
contacts.emptySelection: Select a contact or create a new one
contacts.noSummary: No phone numbers, email, or notes yet

picturePicker.title: Choose Picture
picturePicker.description: Select a picture for this contact

messages.importEmpty: No contacts were imported from that vCard file.
messages.imported: Imported {{imported}} new contacts and merged {{merged}} duplicates.

browseContacts.title: Browse Contacts
browseContacts.description: Use the left sidebar to search, filter, and switch between saved contacts

createContacts.title: Create Contacts
createContacts.description: File ▸ New Contact adds names, numbers, email, addresses, and freeform notes

importVCards.title: Import vCards
importVCards.description: Drop .vcf files in (or use File ▸ Import) to bring in contacts and photos

smartGroups.title: Smart Groups
smartGroups.description: Auto-buckets surface birthdays, work contacts, and Telegram users

useWithRyo.title: Ask Ryo
useWithRyo.description: Ryo can list, create, update, and search contacts straight from Chats

cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync
cloudSync.description: Enable Contacts sync in Control Panels to back up your address book to the cloud

dictionary.title: Dictionary
dictionary.placeholder: Type a word to look it up.
dictionary.poweredBy: Definitions provided by the Free Dictionary API, an open-source project.
dictionary.dataSources: Data sourced from Wiktionary and other open dictionaries. Results may vary for uncommon words.

currency.cachedHint: Using cached rate (refresh by changing pair).
currency.about: Indicative rates from Frankfurter (ECB) or a fallback provider. For information only; not financial advice.

openDashboard.title: Open Dashboard
openDashboard.description: Press F4 (or click the Dashboard icon) to fade in your widget overlay anywhere

widgetLibrary.title: Widget Library
widgetLibrary.description: Add clock, weather, calendar, stocks, mini iPod, sticky note, dictionary, and more

weatherWidget.title: Live Weather
weatherWidget.description: Weather widget pulls real conditions for your location with a quick permission prompt

moveWidgets.title: Drag to Arrange
moveWidgets.description: Drag any widget to reposition it; new widgets auto-place to avoid overlap

layoutPersists.title: Layout Persists
layoutPersists.description: Your widget set and positions stay put across sessions and theme changes

closeDashboard.title: Quick Dismiss
closeDashboard.description: Click the background or press F4/Esc to instantly fade Dashboard back out

browseIconPacks.title: Browse Icon Packs
browseIconPacks.description: Pick a category in the sidebar — System, Devices, Community — to flip through packs

iconPackDetails.title: Pack Preview
iconPackDetails.description: Click any pack to see every icon inside before you commit to applying it

applyIconPacks.title: One-Click Apply
applyIconPacks.description: Hit Apply to swap every desktop, dock, and Finder icon to the new pack instantly

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.description: Star packs you love and they pin to the top of the sidebar for quick swaps

search.title: Search & History
search.description: Search by name or author; built-in back/forward buttons retrace your browsing

cloudLibrary.title: Cloud Library
cloudLibrary.description: Packs live in the ryOS cloud catalog so they're available across every device

clearLibrary.title: Clear Library
clearLibrary.description: Remove all icon packs from the library? You can sync to restore built-in packs.

cursorAgents.emptyTitle: No Cursor agent runs in Redis
cursorAgents.emptyHint: Runs appear here when the repo agent tool starts a Cursor Cloud job (async mode with Redis). Keys expire after about 24 hours.
cursorAgents.truncatedHint: List may be truncated (row limit or scan cap).
cursorAgents.scanIncompleteHint: Redis key scan stopped early; try again or contact ops if this persists.

songs.noSongsMatchFilter: No songs match the current filter

song.forceRefreshTooltip: Re-fetch lyrics from Kugou and clear cached annotations

offline.title: Offline
offline.description: Admin requires an internet connection to manage data.

errors.cannotForceRefresh: Cannot force refresh - no lyrics source or not authenticated

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.description: This application is restricted to administrators only.
accessDenied.loginPrompt: Please log in with an admin account.

profile.pendingTooltip: Not yet processed into long-term memory

dialogs.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {{type}} "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.banDescription: Are you sure you want to ban {{username}}? They will be logged out and unable to access the service.
dialogs.clearMemoriesDescription: This will permanently delete all {{count}} long-term memories for {{username}}. Daily notes will be preserved. This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.reprocessDailyNotesDescription: This will reset all daily notes for {{username}} and re-extract long-term memories from them. Existing memories will be updated/merged. Only past days will be processed (not today).
dialogs.unshareDescription: This will remove "{{name}}" from {{user}}'s shared songs. The song will remain in the library but won't be associated with any user.

adminAccess.title: Admin Only
adminAccess.description: Locked down to the admin user (ryo) — auth-gated on every action

userManagement.title: User Management
userManagement.description: Page through registered users, view profiles, and revoke or rename accounts

roomManagement.title: Room Moderation
roomManagement.description: Inspect chat rooms with IRC metadata; delete inappropriate content fast

songLibrary.title: Song Library
songLibrary.description: Bulk import, export, and clean the cached YouTube + lyrics song library

searchFilter.title: Search & Filter
searchFilter.description: Quickly search users or songs by name across paginated grids

statistics.title: System Stats
statistics.description: Live usage metrics including a Cursor agent runs telemetry card

places.title: Places
places.allEmpty: Search for a place and use the card actions to save it as Home, Work, or a Favorite.

status.missingToken: Apple Maps isn't configured yet. Ask the developer to add MapKit credentials.
status.tokenHint: The server signs short-lived MapKit tokens automatically once credentials are configured.

searchPlaces.title: Search Places
searchPlaces.description: Type a city, business, or address in the search bar to find it on the map

dropPins.title: Drop Pins
dropPins.description: Pick a result from the list to drop a pin and recenter the map on it

locateMe.title: Locate Me
locateMe.description: Click the Locate Me button to recenter the map on your current location

mapTypes.title: Map Types
mapTypes.description: Switch between Standard, Hybrid, and Satellite from the View menu

poweredByApple.title: Powered by Apple Maps
poweredByApple.description: Maps tiles, search, and geocoding are provided by Apple MapKit JS

switchMapStyle.title: Switch Map Style
switchMapStyle.description: Use the View menu to toggle between Standard, Hybrid, Satellite, and Muted Standard.

language.title: Language
language.description: Select your preferred language for ryOS interface
